---
title: "README"
output: html_document
---

## LERH Course
 
See also the online material [HERE](https://www.cirgeo.unipd.it/archivio/shared/R/Course_LERH_PhD_Geomatics/)

Check script [PhDscriptRgee.R](PhDscriptRgee.R)

GEE script are  shared [HERE](https://code.earthengine.google.com/?accept_repo=users/cirgeo/phdCourse)
